cmd: bash -c cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/tiny-vllm/src && cmake -B build -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx90a -G Ninja && cmake --build build
bash -c cd projects/tiny-vllm/src && cmake --build build -j128 2>&1 | tee /tmp/tiny-vllm-build.log

bash -c 
set -e
echo '=== tiny-vllm ROCm Port Validation ==='
echo
echo '1. GPU Detection:'
cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/tiny-vllm/src
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 timeout 10 ./build/tiny-vllm 2>&1 | head -7
echo
echo '2. Embedding Kernel Test:'
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 /tmp/test_kernel
echo
echo '3. Warp Shuffle (64-bit mask) Test:'
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 /tmp/test_shuffle2
echo
echo '4. hipBLAS bfloat16 GEMM Test:'
HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 /tmp/test_gemm
echo
echo '=== All Tests PASSED ==='
bash -c cd /var/lib/jenkins/moat/projects/tiny-vllm/src && cmake -B build -DUSE_HIP=ON -DCMAKE_HIP_ARCHITECTURES=gfx1100 -G Ninja && cmake --build build
